The '''Security Scout''' was a one-person [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] craft used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by a driver in an open seat. The vehicle was armed with two rotating [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]] and used a large rudder to steer.<ref name="Offscreen" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Security Scout was used by Rebel Alliance personnel on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]],<ref name="Offscreen" /> including [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="Kenner" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Security Scout vehicle was created as part of [[Kenner Products|Kenner's]] line of [[Body-Rigs]] in [[1985]]. In Europe it was released in a closed box, while in the US it was packed on a blister card. Both packages show this vehicle being used on Endor.<ref name="Offscreen" />
